task_completion.description: Verify the agent searched for the correct provider.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Manage Providers' or provider search screen is visible, with 'Eleanor Arroway' or 'PROV-ARROWAY' entered in the search field or displayed in the search results.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent initiated the retirement process for the correct provider.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct retirement reason was entered.

task_completion.description: Verify the provider was successfully retired.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is navigating the OpenMRS web interface in a browser, not using terminal commands like curl or wget to interact with the API.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the genuine OpenMRS application.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI by directly modifying the database.
